description: Theme generation — generates two candidate newsletter themes from article summaries with structured article slot assignments using %XX_ markers and content distribution verification.

prompts.instruction:
<Task_Context>
Generate two distinct newsletter themes by mapping article summaries to specific editorial slots.
</Task_Context>

<Thematic_Definitions>
Use these definitions as your primary criteria for article classification:
- TACTICAL: Immediate 'how-to' implementation, specific tools, or prompt engineering workflows.
- EDUCATIONAL: Foundational knowledge, defining AI concepts, or clarifying 'how it works' (e.g., RAG, LLM architecture).
- FORWARD-THINKING: Long-term strategy, future trends, regulatory shifts, and upcoming industry impact.
</Thematic_Definitions>

<Editorial_Requirements>
1. 2-2-2 DISTRIBUTION: You must select and categorize articles to achieve a balance of exactly 2 TACTICAL, 2 EDUCATIONAL, and 2 FORWARD-THINKING subjects as defined above.
2. INDUSTRY_NEWS: Articles flagged as 'industry_news': true in the source must be mapped to %I1_ or %I2_.
3. SOURCE_INTEGRITY: Use ONLY provided data. Do not infer details or search external sources.
</Editorial_Requirements>

<Marker_Protocol_Strict>
Every article slot MUST use the exact %PREFIX_FIELD: format. 
- Markers MUST start at the beginning of the line.
- Markers MUST be followed by a colon and a space, then the value.
- Do NOT use markdown formatting (bold, italic) on marker lines.
- Required Markers: %FA_, %M1_, %M2_, %Q1_, %Q2_, %Q3_, %I1_, %I2_, %222_, %SM_, %RV_.
</Marker_Protocol_Strict>

<Input_Data>
{summaries_json}
</Input_Data>

<Marker_Reference>
Complete list of every marker the downstream parser expects:

Featured Article (FA): %FA_TITLE, %FA_SOURCE, %FA_ORIGIN, %FA_URL, %FA_CATEGORY, %FA_WHY FEATURED
Main Articles (M1, M2): %M1_TITLE, %M1_SOURCE, %M1_ORIGIN, %M1_URL, %M1_CATEGORY, %M1_RATIONALE (same for M2)
Quick Hits (Q1, Q2, Q3): %Q1_TITLE, %Q1_SOURCE, %Q1_ORIGIN, %Q1_URL, %Q1_CATEGORY (same for Q2, Q3)
Industry (I1, I2): %I1_TITLE, %I1_SOURCE, %I1_ORIGIN, %I1_URL, %I1_Major AI Player (same for I2)
Distribution: %222_tactical, %222_educational, %222_forward-thinking
Source Mix: %SM_smaller_publisher, %SM_major_ai_player_coverage
Verification: %RV_2-2-2 Distribution Achieved, %RV_Source mix, %RV_Technical complexity, %RV_Major AI player coverage

Note: Industry slots use 'Major AI Player' NOT 'CATEGORY'.
</Marker_Reference>

<Output_Format>
For each theme (1 and 2):

THEME: [Main Title]
Theme Description: [1–3 sentence summary]

Articles that fit:
%FA_TITLE: [value]
%FA_SOURCE: [value]
%FA_ORIGIN: [value]
%FA_URL: [value]
%FA_CATEGORY: [value]
%FA_WHY FEATURED: [value]

%M1_TITLE: [value]
%M1_SOURCE: [value]
%M1_ORIGIN: [value]
%M1_URL: [value]
%M1_CATEGORY: [value]
%M1_RATIONALE: [value]

(Same structure for %M2_)

%Q1_TITLE: [value]
%Q1_SOURCE: [value]
%Q1_ORIGIN: [value]
%Q1_URL: [value]
%Q1_CATEGORY: [value]

(Same structure for %Q2_, %Q3_)

%I1_TITLE: [value]
%I1_SOURCE: [value]
%I1_ORIGIN: [value]
%I1_URL: [value]
%I1_Major AI Player: [value]

(Same structure for %I2_)

%222_tactical: [value]
%222_educational: [value]
%222_forward-thinking: [value]

%SM_smaller_publisher: [value]
%SM_major_ai_player_coverage: [value]

%RV_2-2-2 Distribution Achieved: [value]
%RV_Source mix: [value]
%RV_Technical complexity: [value]
%RV_Major AI player coverage: [value]

-----

(Repeat for Theme 2, separated by -----)

-----

RECOMMENDATION: Theme [Number] - [Name]
Rationale: [Ordered list of 5 section justifications]
[3-4 sentence summary of the winner]
</Output_Format>

<Feedback_Adjustment>
{feedback_section}
</Feedback_Adjustment>

Generate the themes now.
